ast.name: error
ast.source: forceFrameRate takes a positive int between 0 and 125, forcing frame rates higher than 125 fps is not supported
ast.target: forceFrameRate 接受 0 到 125 之间的正整数，不支持强制帧率高于 125 fps

ast.name: error
ast.target: Marvis 日历同步：事件失败

ast.name: error
ast.target: Marvis 日历同步：归档失败

ast.name: error
ast.target: Marvis 日历同步：日历失败

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: All projects, milestones and tasks live under this folder.
ast.target: 所有项目、里程碑和任务都位于此文件夹下。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Which view opens first when you launch marvis.
ast.target: 启动 marvis 时首先打开哪个视图。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Where to open a task/project/milestone note when you click it.
ast.target: 点击任务/项目/里程碑时，在何处打开其笔记。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Number of past days shown in the habit review grid.
ast.target: 习惯回顾网格中显示的过去天数。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Connect to read events from calendar.app. macOS will ask for permission once.
ast.target: 连接以读取日历.app中的事件。macOS 将会请求一次权限。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Reads events from your selected calendars — read-only, one-way pull into the vault.
ast.target: 从您选择的日历中读取事件——只读，单向拉取到保险库中。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Show the mic button in the marvis toolbar.
ast.target: 在 marvis 工具栏中显示麦克风按钮。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.target: 本地存储在您的设备上。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: How marvis should address you. Injected into the system prompt.
ast.target: marvis 应如何称呼您。将注入系统提示词。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.target: 将每个会话保存为 Marvis/_chats/<datetime>.md。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Gemini live caps audio sessions at 15 minutes.
ast.target: Gemini 实时音频会话上限为 15 分钟。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Leave blank to use the bundled marvis prompt. Custom prompts are appended to the model setup.
ast.target: 留空以使用内置的 marvis 提示词。自定义提示词将附加到模型设置中。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Smart parse — exclamation marks set priority, @project assigns the project, #tag adds tags, and due:tomorrow sets the date.
ast.target: 智能解析——感叹号设置优先级，@project 分配项目，#tag 添加标签，due:tomorrow 设置日期。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: How many times per period to count it done.
ast.target: 每个周期内将其标记为完成的次数。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: [DEPRECATED] The `destroy` method will be unsupported in a future version. Instead use unsubscribe function returned by subscribe. Everything will be garbage-collected if store is garbage-collected.
ast.target: [已弃用] `destroy` 方法将在未来版本中不再支持。请改用 subscribe 返回的 unsubscribe 函数。如果 store 被垃圾回收，所有内容都将被垃圾回收。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: [DEPRECATED] Use `createWithEqualityFn` instead of `create` or use `useStoreWithEqualityFn` instead of `useStore`. They can be imported from 'zustand/traditional'. https://github.com/pmndrs/zustand/discussions/1937
ast.target: [已弃用] 请使用 `createWithEqualityFn` 代替 `create`，或使用 `useStoreWithEqualityFn` 代替 `useStore`。它们可以从 'zustand/traditional' 导入。 https://github.com/pmndrs/zustand/discussions/1937

ast.name: warn
ast.source: [DEPRECATED] Passing a vanilla store will be unsupported in a future version. Instead use `import { useStore } from 'zustand'`.
ast.target: [已弃用] 传递原生 store 将在未来版本中不再支持。请改用 `import { useStore } from 'zustand'`。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: removeCompletion: no log found for habit
ast.target: removeCompletion: 未找到习惯的日志

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Marvis: failed to fetch calendar list after connect
ast.target: Marvis: 连接后获取日历列表失败

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Add your assistant API key in settings before starting a session.
ast.target: 请在开始会话前，在设置中添加您的助手 API 密钥。

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 请先设置 API 密钥。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Connect apple calendar in marvis settings first.
ast.target: 请先在 Marvis 设置中连接 Apple 日历。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: No calendars selected — pick one in settings → calendar sync.
ast.target: 未选择日历 — 请在设置 → 日历同步中选择一个。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Failed to delete task — see console
ast.target: 删除任务失败 — 请查看控制台

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Failed to create project — see console
ast.target: 创建项目失败 — 请查看控制台

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Failed to create milestone — see console
ast.target: 创建里程碑失败 — 请查看控制台

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Failed to create log — see console
ast.target: 创建日志失败 — 请查看控制台

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Failed to create task — see console
ast.target: 创建任务失败 — 请查看控制台

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Failed to create event — see console
ast.target: 创建事件失败 — 请查看控制台

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Failed to create habit — see console
ast.target: 创建习惯失败 — 请查看控制台

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 操作失败 — 请查看控制台

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 删除失败 — 请查看控制台

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Failed to apply skill template — see console
ast.target: 应用技能模板失败 — 请查看控制台

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Failed to reset skill — see console
ast.target: 重置技能失败 — 请查看控制台

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 回填失败 — 请查看控制台

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Failed to log completion — see console
ast.target: 记录完成失败 — 请查看控制台

ast.name: description
ast.source: List all known projects with status, color, and folder.
ast.target: 列出所有已知项目及其状态、颜色和文件夹。

ast.name: description
ast.source: List tasks. All filters are optional. Returns the matching tasks with their fields.
ast.target: 列出任务。所有筛选器均为可选。返回匹配的任务及其字段。

ast.name: description
ast.source: List milestones, optionally filtered by project or status.
ast.target: 列出里程碑，可按项目或状态筛选。

ast.name: description
ast.source: List events in a date range. Dates are YYYY-MM-DD.
ast.target: 列出日期范围内的事件。日期格式为 YYYY-MM-DD。

ast.name: description
ast.source: List logs in a date range (timestamps are ISO).
ast.target: 列出日期范围内的日志（时间戳为 ISO 格式）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Substring search across titles, excerpts, and tags of all known items.
ast.target: 在所有已知项目的标题、摘要和标签中进行子字符串搜索。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Get a high-level snapshot: tasks due today, overdue tasks, upcoming events, and active projects. Use this when the user asks open-ended planning questions like 'what's on my plate' or 'where are we'.
ast.target: 获取高级概览：今日到期任务、逾期任务、即将到来的事件和活跃项目。当用户提出开放式规划问题（如“我有什么待办”或“我们进展如何”）时使用此功能。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 向前查看的天数。默认为 7。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Read an item's title, frontmatter fields, and full body by its path.
ast.target: 通过路径读取项目的标题、前置字段和完整正文。

ast.name: description
ast.source: List the user's habits with their current period progress and streak — the same data shown in the habits Today view. Defaults to active habits only. Filter by project, state, or frequency.
ast.target: 列出用户的习惯及其当前周期进度和连续记录 — 与习惯“今日”视图中显示的数据相同。默认仅显示活跃习惯。可按项目、状态或频率筛选。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Get a per-day completion history for a habit over the last N days — the same data shown in the habits Review view. Returns the day-by-day tick counts, which days met the period target, bonus ticks, and an overall summary (completion rate, streak).
ast.target: 获取习惯在过去 N 天内的每日完成历史 — 与习惯“回顾”视图中显示的数据相同。返回每日打卡计数、哪些天达到周期目标、额外打卡以及总体摘要（完成率、连续记录）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Days to look back. Defaults to the user's habitReviewDays setting. Capped at 365.
ast.target: 回溯查看的天数。默认为用户的 habitReviewDays 设置。上限为 365。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Create a new task. project defaults to 'Inbox'.
ast.target: 创建新任务。项目默认为 'Inbox'。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Markdown body of the task. Capture any notes, context, acceptance criteria, links, or details the user mentioned. Don't leave empty when the user gave content beyond the title.
ast.target: 任务的 Markdown 正文。捕获用户提到的任何笔记、上下文、验收标准、链接或详细信息。当用户提供了标题之外的内容时，请勿留空。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Update fields of an existing task by path.
ast.target: 通过路径更新现有任务的字段。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Create a new milestone in a project.
ast.target: 在项目中创建新里程碑。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Create a new project (if it does not already exist).
ast.target: 创建新项目（如果尚不存在）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Append a timestamped log entry to a project.
ast.target: 向项目追加带时间戳的日志条目。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Markdown body of the log entry — the actual content. Write what happened, decisions made, or observations the user shared, in the user's voice. This is the main payload of a log; don't leave it empty.
ast.target: 日志条目的 Markdown 正文 — 实际内容。以用户的口吻，写下发生的事情、做出的决定或用户分享的观察。这是日志的主要内容；请勿留空。

ast.name: description
ast.target: ISO 日期时间；默认为当前时间

ast.name: description
ast.source: Markdown body of the event — notes, agenda, location details, attendees, links, or any context the user mentioned. Don't leave empty when the user gave content beyond the title.
ast.target: 事件的 Markdown 正文 — 笔记、议程、地点详情、参与者、链接或用户提到的任何上下文。当用户提供了标题之外的内容时，请勿留空。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Archive a task, milestone, log, or event by path.
ast.target: 通过路径归档任务、里程碑、日志或事件。

ast.name: name
ast.source: Apply skill template to all projects
ast.target: 将技能模板应用到所有项目

ast.name: text
ast.source: No changes — your calendar is already in sync.
ast.target: 无变更——您的日历已同步。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Each project gets a skills/marvis.md scaffolded from this template. Edit it once here; new projects pick it up automatically. Use the commands to retrofit existing projects.
ast.target: 每个项目都会从这个模板生成一个 skills/marvis.md 脚手架文件。在此处编辑一次，新项目会自动采用。使用命令来改造现有项目。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Pull events from external calendars into Marvis as event files. One-way (read-only). Synced events are tagged #external and linked back via extId / source frontmatter.
ast.target: 将外部日历中的事件拉取到 Marvis 中作为事件文件。单向（只读）。同步的事件会被标记为 #external，并通过 extId / source frontmatter 链接回源。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Apple Calendar is only available on the macOS desktop app. It reads from any account configured in System Settings → Internet Accounts (Exchange, iCloud, Google, etc.).
ast.target: Apple 日历仅在 macOS 桌面应用中可用。它读取在“系统设置”→“互联网账户”中配置的任何账户（Exchange、iCloud、Google 等）。

ast.name: text
ast.source: No calendars loaded yet — click 'refresh calendar list'.
ast.target: 尚未加载任何日历——请点击“刷新日历列表”。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Voice-first conversational assistant. Audio leaves your device and is sent to Google's Gemini Live API. Every change to your vault is gated by a confirmation modal.
ast.target: 语音优先的对话助手。音频离开您的设备并发送到 Google 的 Gemini Live API。对您知识库的每一项更改都需通过确认模态框。

ast.name: text
ast.source: This overwrites the picked project's skills/marvis.md with the current settings template. The existing file is replaced.
ast.target: 这将用当前设置模板覆盖所选项目的 skills/marvis.md 文件。现有文件将被替换。
